name: gocometapi
description: Reusable API automation framework for JSONPlaceholder using Playwright and TypeScript.

scripts.allure:generate:reports: node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process'); const d=new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-'); execSync(`npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o reports/allure-${d}`, {stdio:'inherit'});"
